home1_html: Hi there! My name is Nacho Jáuregui, director & freelance editor from Bilbao living in Madrid. Since 2015 I’ve been doing a wide variety of projects worldwide, narrative & commercial. If you like what you see, please contact me and let’s start working together.
modal1_html: Filmed as a journalism documentary, this mockumentary for DDB SPAIN & OLIVE OILS FROM SPAIN, along with 5 other spots, report the fact that the United States doesn’t yet know the source of the world’s best Extra Virgin Olive Oil. Awarded with INTEGRATED Bronze Prize at the BEST AWARDS 2019.
modal2_html: A rider’s helmet is how they express their identity when they’re on their bike. Here, Marc Márquez talks us through the meaning behind each of the iconic designs he has worn over the past five seasons. He reveals the concept behind each idea, exactly what it means to him and how each particular helmet expresses something about himself. Available at Red Bull TV.
modal3_html: #PRIMERO talks about the friendship of Irene, Laura and Dani, three friends that are studying abroad in different cities, starting their first year at college. After 6 months of work, this 10 chapter online series is a multiplatform branding strategy for CEU Universities that tries to empathize with the Z Generation and their personal experiences.
modal4_html: ‘FURIA’ is an organic clothing brand that compromises with the environment. With exclusive designs from mythological themes to historical ones, we tried to convey their unisex nature through fluid dancing and elegance.
modal5_html: ‘#BETTERCONNECTED’ is the last campaing from Telefónica that works towards visualizing the national talent through unique stories, from athletes to scientists, that are able to connect with following generations. The whole campaign is available at mejorconectados.com.
modal6_html: Seven athletes from FER were dreaming about the Olympic Games from 2020 until COVID-19 arrived unexpectedly. This documentary shows their training before, during and after the world pandemic. And how their perseverance and courage play a fundamental role in their lives. Available at Amazon Prime Video and YouTube.
modal7_html: The ‘What Really Matters’ foundation has one goal: spread universal human values to society. Through the testimonies of their collaborators and relevant people, we get to know their history and their future. Available at Movistar +.
modal8_html: The spot from 2019’s Season of Sagardobus represents what we are, what we have been and what we will be. The narration is inspired by Eva Perón‘s last speech about her love for her native lands.
modal9_html: SENDEROS is a farewell to one of the best Spanish dubbing actors, Pepe Mediavilla. A couple of years ago he voiced over one of my projects, The Awakening of the Giant, and when I knew that he had passed away, I did this as a tribute to its person. This short film mixes the spectacular landscapes from Jordan and Pepe’s voice, with a fantastic soundtrack from Philip Cuccias, Hammock & Chris Coleman.
modal10_html: Digital content creation is a strong point at Eastpak‘s branding, who trusted us, a group of content creators, to represent the lifestyle from the big city atmosphere. With the hashtag #handsfreeliving, we represented Eastpak’s philosophy from portraits of Williamsburg to spots in the world's famous underground metro. All the content was shared on social media.
about1_html: Hi there! My name is Nacho Jáuregui, director and editor from Bilbao who lives in Madrid.
about2_html: I studied Advertising & Public Relations at the University of the Basque Country and specialized through a Master Degree in Editing & Post Production at CICE: the School of New Technology.
about3_html: Since 2015 I’ve been working with a large number of customers with one unique goal: project their image the best way possible and with the best team. I love collaborative environments and good results from a hard working group of people.
about4_html: So, if you want to start working together, send me an email to hola@nachojauregui.com or contact me directly through my social media.
